dialogue.greeting: Ah, another adventurer. I have goods if you have coin.
dialogue.no_gold: Come back when you have gold, friend.
dialogue.farewell: Stay sharp down there. The dungeon eats the careless.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome, seeker. I deal in arcane wares.
dialogue.no_gold: Magic demands sacrifice. Return with gold.
dialogue.farewell: May the arcane guide your path.

dialogue.greeting: Psst... I have what you need. If the price is right.
dialogue.no_gold: No coin, no goods. Simple as that.
dialogue.farewell: Don't tell anyone about me. I have enemies.

dialogue.greeting: I am Sir Aldric, last of the King's Guard. The dungeon must be cleansed.
dialogue.quest: The skeleton lord lurks on floor 3. Defeat him and bring me his crown.
dialogue.quest_complete: You did it! The realm owes you a debt. Take this blessing.
dialogue.no_quest: The dungeon grows more dangerous. Stay vigilant.

dialogue.greeting: Thank goodness someone found me! I was researching the dungeon's artifacts.
dialogue.quest: I need an Arcane Crystal from the deeper floors. It holds ancient power.
dialogue.quest_complete: This is exactly what I needed! You've helped advance magical knowledge.
dialogue.no_quest: Be careful with the magical creatures. They guard their treasures fiercely.

dialogue.greeting: I am Sir Celdric. I sealed the passage below — something terrible lurks there.
dialogue.lore: The sealed floor holds power beyond imagination. But the lock requires sacrifice.
dialogue.sell_success: The key is yours. Use it wisely. The creatures within show no mercy.
dialogue.sell_fail: You don't have enough gold. Kill the creatures on this floor first.
dialogue.already_bought: You already have the key. Find the locked door on floor 2.
dialogue.farewell: The sealed depths await. But only with the key.

dialogue.greeting: I... I cannot rest. The dragon took everything.
dialogue.lore: This dungeon was once the kingdom of Valdris. The dragon corrupted it from within.
dialogue.hint: The dragon is vulnerable to holy weapons. Seek the Paladin's blade.

dialogue.greeting: A spectral whisper echoes through the walls...
dialogue.lore: Five floors deep. The dragon Kael'thrax sits at the bottom. Many have tried. None returned.
dialogue.hint: Stock up on potions before floor 4. The trolls hit hard.

dialogue.greeting: You... you can see me? I am Sir Kaelan. I betrayed my king.
dialogue.lore: I opened the gates for the dragon. I thought I wanted power. The Grail promised me a kingdom. It gave me a tomb.
dialogue.hint: The Grail at the bottom grants one wish. But the wish is never what you think it is. Destroy it. Please.

dialogue.greeting: I have been here longer than I remember. Perhaps longer than I have existed.
dialogue.lore: The Grail of Wishes was forged from the bones of the first king. It feeds on desire. Every wish makes it stronger.
dialogue.hint: Look for notes in the walls. Someone has been here before. Many someones. They all made the same mistake.

dialogue.greeting: I... I had a name once. I had a class. I had a wish.
dialogue.lore: The Grail took everything. My name. My face. My purpose. I am what remains when a wish is granted.
dialogue.hint: You have been here before. You will be here again. The only way out is to stop wishing.

dialogue.greeting: The light still shines, even in this darkness. I can mend your wounds.
dialogue.heal_success: The wound is mended. Walk carefully.
dialogue.heal_fail: You are already whole. Or perhaps you cannot afford my aid.
dialogue.farewell: May the old light guide your steps.

dialogue.greeting: I've seen too many die down here. Let me help you survive.
dialogue.heal_success: You'll live a while longer. That's all I can promise.
dialogue.heal_fail: I can't heal what isn't broken. Or what you can't pay for.

dialogue.greeting: I transmute... Give me two of worth, and I shall give you one of greater worth.
dialogue.trade_success: The alchemy holds! Behold your new treasure.
dialogue.trade_fail: You lack the necessary components. Two weapons or artifacts, please.

dialogue.greeting: I was the royal forger of Valdris. I can reshape any metal. Bring me two pieces, and I'll make something new.
dialogue.trade_success: The flames speak. Your new weapon is born.
dialogue.trade_fail: Two weapons or artifacts. That is the price of creation.

dialogue.greeting: I see not with eyes, but with the dungeon's memory. But my memory fails me here.
dialogue.quest: Clear every room on this floor. Kill every creature. Open every chest. Then I will know this place.
dialogue.quest_complete: The floor bows to your will. Behold -- all is revealed to me.
dialogue.quest_incomplete: Not yet. There are still rooms that resist your light.
dialogue.farewell: The map remembers what you forget.

dialogue.greeting: I was mapping this dungeon when I lost my way. I can't leave until I know every room.
dialogue.quest: Please -- clear this entire floor. Every monster, every chest. Then I can draw the map and leave.
dialogue.quest_complete: At last! I can see the shape of this place. Thank you, adventurer.
dialogue.quest_incomplete: I still hear echoes in unexplored rooms. There is more to find.

dialogue.greeting: Hey! Over here! I've been stuck for days.
dialogue.lore: The mimics... they look just like chests. Don't trust anything that looks too perfect.
dialogue.hint: Listen for the faint breathing. Real chests don't breathe.
dialogue.rescue: Thank you! I thought I'd die down here. Take this as thanks.
dialogue.trade_offer: I found something valuable but can't use it. Want to trade? I need a Health Potion.
dialogue.trade_accept: Deal! Here, take this. It served me well.
dialogue.trade_refuse: No worries. If you change your mind, I'll be here.
dialogue.follow: I'll follow you for a bit. Watch my back and I'll watch yours.
dialogue.no_gold: I don't have much... but I can share what I know.
dialogue.farewell: Be careful out there. And thanks again.
